title: Leobordea stipulosa
taxonomy: Leobordea stipulosa is classified as a plant species in the family Cucurbitaceae. This family comprises of various gourd-producing plants, and Leobordea stipulosa is a part of this diverse group. Further classification of Leobordea stipulosa places it within the tribe Zanoceae. This tribe primarily consists of plants native to tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Leobordea stipulosa is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
